rationale: Test-only addition (new test function + helpers in gc_test.go); no production code (gc.go/read.go/write.go) is modified. Risk is limited to test flakiness under -race, mitigated by reusing already-proven-correct primitives (EpochManager, RunCompaction, NewSnapshot/Close, CommitVersion) from 2a.2.1/2a.2.2 rather than adding new production logic.
